Accessibility / Color & Contrast / contrastchecker / contrast-checker--self-contained-min

Run Accessibility / Color & Contrast / contrastchecker / contrast-checker--self-contained-min

Test run or drag to
bookmarklets bar to install

javascript:%21function()%7Bif(null%3D%3Ddocument.getElementById(%22contrastletdragable%22))%7Bvar%20e%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Be.id%3D%22contrastletdragable%22%2Ce.style.width%3D%22425px%22%2Ce.style.position%3D%22absolute%22%2Ce.style.right%3D%2220px%22%2Ce.style.top%3Dwindow.pageYOffset%2B20%2B%22px%22%2Ce.style.zIndex%3D%2210000%22%2Ce.style.boxSizing%3D%22content-box%22%3Bvar%20t%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bt.id%3D%22contrastletdragzone%22%2Ct.style.width%3D%22100%25%22%2Ct.style.height%3D%2215px%22%2Ct.style.cursor%3D%22move%22%2Ct.style.backgroundColor%3D%22%230f2c65%22%2Ct.style.boxSizing%3D%22content-box%22%2Ce.appendChild(t)%2Cdocument.body.appendChild(e)%3Bvar%20r%3Ddocument.createElement(%22button%22)%3Br.id%3D%22contrastletclose%22%2Cr.style.width%3D%2215px%22%2Cr.style.height%3D%2215px%22%2Cr.style.float%3D%22right%22%2Cr.style.padding%3D%220%22%2Cr.style.border%3D%220%22%2Cr.style.backgroundColor%3D%22%23777%22%2Cr.style.color%3D%22%23fff%22%2Cr.style.borderTop%3D%221px%20solid%20%230f2c65%22%2Cr.style.borderRight%3D%221px%20solid%20%230f2c65%22%2Cr.setAttribute(%22aria-label%22%2C%22Close%20Contrast%20Checker%22)%2Cr.addEventListener(%22click%22%2Cfunction()%7Be.remove()%7D%2C%211)%3Bvar%20n%3Ddocument.createTextNode(%22X%22)%3Br.appendChild(n)%2Ct.appendChild(r)%3Bvar%20a%3Ddocument.createElement(%22iframe%22)%3Ba.style.width%3D%22421px%22%2Ca.style.height%3D%22438px%22%2Ca.style.margin%3D%220px%22%2Ca.style.borderStyle%3D%22solid%22%2Ca.style.borderColor%3D%22%230f2c65%22%2Ca.style.boxSizing%3D%22content-box%22%2Ca.style.background%3D%22%23fafafa%22%2Ce.appendChild(a)%3Ba.srcdoc%3D%27%3C%21doctype%20html%3E%3Chtml%20lang%3Den%3E%3Cmeta%20charset%3Dutf-8%3E%3Ctitle%3EWebAIM%20Contrast%20Checker%3C%2Ftitle%3E%3Cstyle%3E*%7Bmargin%3A0%3Bpadding%3A0%3Bbox-sizing%3Aborder-box%3Bfont-family%3AArial%2Csans-serif%7Dbody%7Bcolor%3A%23333%3Bbackground%3A%23fafafa%3Bpadding%3A10px%7D%23contrastForm%7Btext-align%3Acenter%7D%23contrastForm%20fieldset%7Btext-align%3Acenter%3Bborder%3A1px%20solid%20%23ccc%3Bborder-radius%3A8px%3Bwidth%3A42%25%3Bmargin%3A0%20.5em%3Bpadding%3A10px%3Bdisplay%3Ainline-block%7D%23contrastForm%20input%7Bcolor%3A%23333%3Bborder%3A1px%20solid%20%23888%3Bborder-radius%3A3px%3Bfont-family%3AArial%2Csans-serif%7D%23contrastForm%20input%5Btype%3Dtext%5D%7Btext-transform%3Auppercase%3Bvertical-align%3Atop%3Bpadding%3A0%204px%3Bfont-size%3A1.5em%7D%23contrastForm%20input%5Btype%3Dcolor%5D%7Bcursor%3Apointer%3Bwidth%3A100%25%3Bheight%3A34px%3Bpadding%3A0%3Bdisplay%3Ablock%7D%23contrastForm%20input%5Btype%3Drange%5D%7Bwidth%3A100%25%3Bheight%3A8px%3Bmargin-right%3A15px%7D%23contrastForm%20label%7Bvertical-align%3Atop%3Bmargin-top%3A.7em%3Bdisplay%3Ainline-block%7D%23contrastForm%20input%5Btype%3Dnumber%5D%7Bwidth%3A60px%3Bmin-height%3A32px%3Bpadding-left%3A4px%3Bdisplay%3Ablock%7D%23Hex1%7Bwidth%3A5.8em%7D%23Hex0%7Bwidth%3A4.3em%7D%23Err0%2C%23Err1%7Bdisplay%3Anone%3Bcolor%3Ared%3Bfont-size%3A12px%3Bmargin-bottom%3A5px%7D%23ratioContainer%7Btext-align%3Acenter%3Bpadding-top%3A.6em%7D%23ratio%7Bfont-size%3A3em%3Bdisplay%3Ablock%7D.results%7Btext-align%3Aleft%3Bmargin-top%3A10px%7D.results%20p%7Bpadding-bottom%3A2px%7D.results%20span%7Bfloat%3Aright%3Btext-align%3Acenter%3Bmargin%3A0%20.5em%3Bpadding%3A0%20.5em%3Bfont-weight%3A700%7Dspan.pass%7Bcolor%3A%23fff%3Bbackground-color%3A%23080%3Bborder-radius%3A1em%7Dspan.fail%7Bcolor%3A%23c00%7D.gradient%7Bposition%3Arelative%3Bwidth%3A100%25%7D.footer%7Btext-align%3Acenter%3Bmargin-top%3A20px%3Bfont-size%3A12px%7D%40media%20only%20screen%20and%20(max-width%3A670px)%7B%23contrastForm%20fieldset%7Bwidth%3A93%25%3Bmargin%3A0%7D%23contrastForm%20input%5Btype%3Dcolor%5D%7Bwidth%3A60px%7D%23contrastForm%20input%5Btype%3Dtext%5D%7Bwidth%3A130px%7D%23ratio%7Bfont-size%3A1.5em%7D%7D%3C%2Fstyle%3E%3Cmain%20id%3Dmaincontainer%3E%3Carticle%20id%3Dmaincontent%3E%3Cform%20id%3DcontrastForm%3E%3Cfieldset%3E%3Clegend%3EForeground%3C%2Flegend%3E%3Cp%20class%3Derror%20id%3DErr1%3EPlease%20enter%20a%20valid%20hex%20value%20(alpha%20value%20optional)%2C%20or%20use%20the%20color%20picker.%3C%2Fp%3E%3Clabel%3EHex%20Value%3Cdiv%3E%23%3Cinput%20id%3DHex1%20maxlength%3D9%20required%3E%3C%2Fdiv%3E%3C%2Flabel%3E%20%3Clabel%3EPicker%20%3Cinput%20id%3DPic1%20type%3Dcolor%3E%3C%2Flabel%3E%20%3Clabel%3EAlpha%20%3Cinput%20id%3DAlpha1%20type%3Dnumber%20max%3D1%20min%3D0%20step%3D0.01%20value%3D1.00%3E%3C%2Flabel%3E%20%3Clabel%20class%3Dlum%3ELuminance%3Cdiv%20class%3Dgradient%3E%3Cinput%20id%3DLig1%20type%3Drange%20max%3D100%20min%3D0%20step%3D1%3E%3C%2Fdiv%3E%3C%2Flabel%3E%3C%2Ffieldset%3E%3Cfieldset%3E%3Clegend%3EBackground%3C%2Flegend%3E%3Cp%20class%3Derror%20id%3DErr0%3EPlease%20enter%20a%20valid%20hex%20value%2C%20or%20use%20the%20color%20picker.%3C%2Fp%3E%3Clabel%3EHex%20Value%3Cdiv%3E%23%3Cinput%20id%3DHex0%20maxlength%3D7%20required%3E%3C%2Fdiv%3E%3C%2Flabel%3E%20%3Clabel%3EPicker%20%3Cinput%20id%3DPic0%20type%3Dcolor%3E%3C%2Flabel%3E%20%3Clabel%20class%3Dlum%3ELuminance%3Cdiv%20class%3Dgradient%3E%3Cinput%20id%3DLig0%20type%3Drange%20max%3D100%20min%3D0%20step%3D1%3E%3C%2Fdiv%3E%3C%2Flabel%3E%3C%2Ffieldset%3E%3C%2Fform%3E%3Cdiv%20id%3DratioContainer%3E%3Cspan%3E%3Cspan%20id%3Dratio%20aria-atomic%3Dfalse%20aria-live%3Dpolite%3E%3C%2Fspan%3E%3C%2Fspan%3E%3C%2Fdiv%3E%3Cdiv%20class%3Dresults%3E%3Cp%3ENormal%20Text%20(AA)%3A%20%3Cspan%20id%3DnormalAA%3E%3C%2Fspan%3E%3Cp%3ELarge%20Text%20(AA)%3A%20%3Cspan%20id%3DbigAA%3E%3C%2Fspan%3E%3Cp%3ENon-text%20Elements%20(AA)%3A%20%3Cspan%20id%3DuiAA%3E%3C%2Fspan%3E%3Cp%3ENormal%20Text%20(AAA)%3A%20%3Cspan%20id%3DnormalAAA%3E%3C%2Fspan%3E%3C%2Fdiv%3E%3Cp%20class%3Dfooter%3EPowered%20by%20WebAIM%3C%2Farticle%3E%3C%2Fmain%3E%3Cscript%3Evar%20%24Alpha%2C%24colorInputs%2C%24ligSliders%2C%24Hex%3D%5B%5D%2C%24Pic%3D%5B%5D%2C%24Lig%3D%5B%5D%2C%24Err%3D%5B%5D%2Ccolor%3D%5B%5D%2CHSL%3D%5B%5D%3Bfunction%20validate(e%2Ct%2Cr%2Ca)%7B6%21%3D%3Dt.length%26%268%21%3D%3Dt.length%7C%7CisNaN(HexToDec(t))%7C%7C4%3D%3Dt.length%26%260%3D%3Dr%3F(e.setAttribute(%22aria-invalid%22%2C%210)%2Ce.setAttribute(%22aria-describedby%22%2C%22Error%22%2Br)%2C%24Err%5Br%5D.style.display%3D%22block%22%2Ce.focus()%2C%24Lig%5Br%5D.parentNode.style.display%3D%22none%22%2C%24Pic%5Br%5D.value%3D%22%23FFFFFF%22%2C1%3D%3Dr%26%26(%24Alpha.value%3D%22%22))%3A(%24Hex%5Br%5D.removeAttribute(%22aria-invalid%22)%2C%24Hex%5Br%5D.removeAttribute(%22aria-describedby%22)%2C%24Err%5Br%5D.style.display%3D%22none%22%2C%24Lig%5Br%5D.parentNode.style.display%3D%22block%22%2Ccolor%5Br%5D%3Dt.toUpperCase()%2Cupdate()%2CupdateAlpha())%2C%24Hex%5B0%5D.getAttribute(%22aria-invalid%22)%7C%7C%24Hex%5B1%5D.getAttribute(%22aria-invalid%22)%3F(document.getElementById(%22ratioContainer%22).style.display%3D%22none%22%2Cdocument.querySelectorAll(%22%5Baria-invalid%5D%22).forEach(function(e)%7Be.closest(%22label%22).nextElementSibling.querySelector(%22input%5Btype%3Dcolor%5D%22).value%3D%22%23FFFFFF%22%7D))%3Adocument.getElementById(%22ratioContainer%22).style.display%3D%22block%22%7Dfunction%20update()%7B%24Hex%5B0%5D.value%3Dcolor%5B0%5D%2C%24Hex%5B1%5D.value%3Dcolor%5B1%5D%2C%22true%22%21%3D%3D%24Hex%5B0%5D.getAttribute(%22aria-invalid%22)%26%26(%24Pic%5B0%5D.value%3D%22%23%22%2Bcolor%5B0%5D)%2C%22true%22%21%3D%3D%24Hex%5B1%5D.getAttribute(%22aria-invalid%22)%26%26(%24Pic%5B1%5D.value%3D%22%23%22%2Bcolor%5B1%5D.substr(0%2C6))%3Bvar%20e%3DRGBtoHSL(HexToDec(color%5B1%5D.substr(0%2C2))%2CHexToDec(color%5B1%5D.substr(2%2C2))%2CHexToDec(color%5B1%5D.substr(4%2C2)))%2Ct%3DRGBtoHSL(HexToDec(color%5B0%5D.substr(0%2C2))%2CHexToDec(color%5B0%5D.substr(2%2C2))%2CHexToDec(color%5B0%5D.substr(4%2C2)))%3B%24Lig%5B1%5D.value%3DMath.round(e%5B2%5D)%2C%24Lig%5B1%5D.parentNode.style.background%3D%22linear-gradient(to%20right%2C%20%23000%2C%20hsl(%22%2Be%5B0%5D%2B%22%2C%22%2Be%5B1%5D%2B%22%25%2C50%25)%2C%20%23FFF)%22%2C%24Lig%5B0%5D.value%3DMath.round(t%5B2%5D)%2C%24Lig%5B0%5D.parentNode.style.background%3D%22linear-gradient(to%20right%2C%20%23000%2C%20hsl(%22%2Bt%5B0%5D%2B%22%2C%22%2Bt%5B1%5D%2B%22%25%2C50%25)%2C%20%23FFF)%22%2CcheckContrast()%7Dfunction%20updateAlpha()%7B%22%22%3D%3D%3D%24Hex%5B1%5D.value.substr(6%2C2)%3F%24Alpha.value%3D1%3A%24Alpha.value%3D(parseInt(%24Hex%5B1%5D.value.substr(6%2C2)%2C16)%2F255).toFixed(2)%7Dfunction%20RGBAtoRGB(e%2Ct)%7Blet%20r%3D%7Br%3AHexToDec(e.substr(0%2C2))%2Cg%3AHexToDec(e.substr(2%2C2))%2Cb%3AHexToDec(e.substr(4%2C2))%2Ca%3AHexToDec(e.substr(6%2C2))%2F255%7D%2Ca%3D%7Br%3AHexToDec(t.substr(0%2C2))%2Cg%3AHexToDec(t.substr(2%2C2))%2Cb%3AHexToDec(t.substr(4%2C2))%7D%3Bvar%20n%3Dr.a%3BisNaN(n)%26%26(n%3D1)%3Bvar%20o%3DMath.round((1-n)*a.r%2Bn*r.r)%2Ci%3DMath.round((1-n)*a.g%2Bn*r.g)%2Cl%3DMath.round((1-n)*a.b%2Bn*r.b)%3Breturn%20padHex(o.toString(16))%2BpadHex(i.toString(16))%2BpadHex(l.toString(16))%7Dfunction%20padHex(e)%7Breturn(%220%22%2Be).slice(-2)%7Dfunction%20changeHue(e)%7BRGB%3DHSLtoRGB((HSL%3DRGBtoHSL(HexToDec(color%5Be%5D.substr(0%2C2))%2CHexToDec(color%5Be%5D.substr(2%2C2))%2CHexToDec(color%5Be%5D.substr(4%2C2))))%5B0%5D%2CHSL%5B1%5D%2C%24Lig%5Be%5D.value)%3Bfor(var%20t%3D%22%22%2Cr%3D0%3Br%3C3%3Br%2B%2B)t%2B%3DRGB%5Br%5D%3E%3D16%3FRGB%5Br%5D.toString(16)%3A%220%22%2BRGB%5Br%5D.toString(16)%3Bcolor%5Be%5D%3D(t%2Bcolor%5Be%5D.substr(6%2C2)).toUpperCase()%2Cupdate()%7Dfunction%20checkContrast()%7Btry%7Bvar%20e%3DRGBAtoRGB(color%5B1%5D%2Ccolor%5B0%5D)%2Ct%3DgetL(e)%2Cr%3DgetL(color%5B0%5D)%2Ca%3D(Math.max(t%2Cr)%2B.05)%2F(Math.min(t%2Cr)%2B.05)%3Bdocument.getElementById(%22ratio%22).innerHTML%3D%22%3Cb%3E%22%2BDec2(100*a%2F100)%2B%22%3C%2Fb%3E%3A1%22%3Bvar%20n%3Ddocument.getElementById(%22normalAA%22)%2Co%3Ddocument.getElementById(%22bigAA%22)%2Ci%3Ddocument.getElementById(%22normalAAA%22)%2Cl%3Ddocument.getElementById(%22uiAA%22)%2Cs%3Ddocument.getElementById(%22ratioContainer%22)%3Bn%26%26(a%3E%3D4.5%3F(n.className%3D%22pass%22%2Cn.textContent%3D%22Pass%22)%3A(n.className%3D%22fail%22%2Cn.textContent%3D%22Fail%22))%2Cs%26%26(s.className%3Da%3E%3D4.5%3F%22pass%22%3A%22%22)%2Co%26%26(a%3E%3D3%3F(o.className%3D%22pass%22%2Co.textContent%3D%22Pass%22)%3A(o.className%3D%22fail%22%2Co.textContent%3D%22Fail%22))%2Cl%26%26(a%3E%3D3%3F(l.className%3D%22pass%22%2Cl.textContent%3D%22Pass%22)%3A(l.className%3D%22fail%22%2Cl.textContent%3D%22Fail%22))%2Ci%26%26(a%3E%3D7%3F(i.className%3D%22pass%22%2Ci.textContent%3D%22Pass%22)%3A(i.className%3D%22fail%22%2Ci.textContent%3D%22Fail%22))%7Dcatch(u)%7Bconsole.error(%22Error%20in%20checkContrast%20function%3A%22%2Cu)%7D%7Dfunction%20HexToDec(e)%7Bif(RegExp(%2F%5E%5Ba-f%7C0-9%5D%2B%24%2Fi).test(e))return%20parseInt(e%2C16)%7Dfunction%20HSLtoRGB(e%2Ct%2Cr)%7Bvar%20a%2Cn%2Co%3Bif(r%2F%3D100%2C0%3D%3D(t%2F%3D100))a%3Dn%3Do%3Dr%3Belse%7Bvar%20i%3Dr%3C.5%3Fr*(1%2Bt)%3Ar%2Bt-r*t%2Cl%3D2*r-i%3Ba%3DhueToRgb(l%2Ci%2Ce%2B120)%2Cn%3DhueToRgb(l%2Ci%2Ce)%2Co%3DhueToRgb(l%2Ci%2Ce-120)%7Dreturn%5BMath.round(255*a)%2CMath.round(255*n)%2CMath.round(255*o)%5D%7Dfunction%20hueToRgb(e%2Ct%2Cr)%7Breturn(r%3C0%26%26(r%2B%3D360)%2Cr%3E360%26%26(r-%3D360)%2Cr%3C60)%3Fe%2B(t-e)*r%2F60%3Ar%3C180%3Ft%3Ar%3C240%3Fe%2B(t-e)*(240-r)%2F60%3Ae%7Dfunction%20RGBtoHSL(e%2Ct%2Cr)%7Bvar%20a%2Cn%2Co%3DMath.max(e%2F%3D255%2Ct%2F%3D255%2Cr%2F%3D255)%2Ci%3DMath.min(e%2Ct%2Cr)%2Cl%3D(o%2Bi)%2F2%3Bif(o%3D%3D%3Di)a%3Dn%3D0%3Belse%7Bvar%20s%3Do-i%3Bswitch(n%3Dl%3E.5%3Fs%2F(2-o-i)%3As%2F(o%2Bi)%2Co)%7Bcase%20e%3Aa%3D(t-r)%2Fs%2B(t%3Cr%3F6%3A0)%3Bbreak%3Bcase%20t%3Aa%3D(r-e)%2Fs%2B2%3Bbreak%3Bcase%20r%3Aa%3D(e-t)%2Fs%2B4%7Da*%3D60%7Dreturn%5BMath.round(a)%2CMath.round(100*n)%2CMath.round(100*l)%5D%7Dfunction%20getsRGB(e)%7Breturn(e%3DHexToDec(e)%2F255)%3C%3D.03928%3Fe%2F12.92%3AMath.pow((e%2B.055)%2F1.055%2C2.4)%7Dfunction%20getL(e)%7Breturn%20.2126*getsRGB(e.substr(0%2C2))%2B.7152*getsRGB(e.substr(2%2C2))%2B.0722*getsRGB(e.substr(4%2C2))%7Dfunction%20Dec2(e)%7Bif(-1%3D%3D%3D(e%3DString(e)).indexOf(%22.%22))return%20Number(e)%3Bvar%20t%3De.split(%22.%22)%3Breturn%201%3D%3D%3Dt.length%3FNumber(e)%3ANumber(t%5B0%5D%2B%22.%22%2Bt%5B1%5D.charAt(0)%2Bt%5B1%5D.charAt(1))%7Dfunction%20initialize()%7Btry%7B%24Alpha%3Ddocument.getElementById(%22Alpha1%22)%2C%24Hex%5B0%5D%3Ddocument.getElementById(%22Hex0%22)%2C%24Hex%5B1%5D%3Ddocument.getElementById(%22Hex1%22)%2C%24Pic%5B0%5D%3Ddocument.getElementById(%22Pic0%22)%2C%24Pic%5B1%5D%3Ddocument.getElementById(%22Pic1%22)%2C%24Lig%5B0%5D%3Ddocument.getElementById(%22Lig0%22)%2C%24Lig%5B1%5D%3Ddocument.getElementById(%22Lig1%22)%2C%24Err%5B0%5D%3Ddocument.getElementById(%22Err0%22)%2C%24Err%5B1%5D%3Ddocument.getElementById(%22Err1%22)%2C%24Lig%5B0%5D.addEventListener(%22input%22%2Cfunction()%7BchangeHue(0)%7D)%2C%24Lig%5B1%5D.addEventListener(%22input%22%2Cfunction()%7BchangeHue(1)%7D)%2C%24Hex%5B0%5D.addEventListener(%22change%22%2Cfunction()%7BhandleColorChange(this)%7D)%2C%24Hex%5B1%5D.addEventListener(%22change%22%2Cfunction()%7BhandleColorChange(this)%7D)%2C%24Pic%5B0%5D.addEventListener(%22change%22%2Cfunction()%7BhandleColorChange(this)%7D)%2C%24Pic%5B1%5D.addEventListener(%22change%22%2Cfunction()%7BhandleColorChange(this)%7D)%2C%24Alpha.addEventListener(%22input%22%2Cfunction()%7Bthis.value%3E1%3Fthis.value%3D1%3Athis.value%3C0%26%26(this.value%3D0)%3Bvar%20e%3D%22%22%3B1%21%3Dthis.value%26%26(e%3DpadHex(Math.round(255*%24Alpha.value).toString(16)))%2Ccolor%5B1%5D%3D%24Hex%5B1%5D.value.substr(0%2C6)%2Be%2Cupdate()%7D)%2Cdocument.getElementById(%22contrastForm%22).addEventListener(%22submit%22%2Cfunction(e)%7Be.preventDefault()%7D)%2Ccolor%5B1%5D%3D%220000FF%22%2Ccolor%5B0%5D%3D%22FFFFFF%22%2Cupdate()%2CupdateAlpha()%2Cvalidate(%24Hex%5B0%5D%2C%24Hex%5B0%5D.value%7C%7Ccolor%5B0%5D%2C0%2C%22%22)%2Cvalidate(%24Hex%5B1%5D%2C%24Hex%5B1%5D.value%7C%7Ccolor%5B1%5D%2C1%2C%22%22)%7Dcatch(e)%7Bconsole.error(%22Error%20initializing%20app%3A%22%2Ce)%7D%7Dfunction%20handleColorChange(e)%7Bvar%20t%3De.value%2Cr%3De.id.substr(-1)%2Ca%3D%24Hex%5B1%5D.value.substr(6%2C2)%3B%24Err%5Br%5D.style.display%3D%22none%22%2C%22%23%22%3D%3D%3Dt.substr(0%2C1)%26%26(t%3Dt.slice(1))%2C(3%3D%3D%3Dt.length%7C%7C4%3D%3D%3Dt.length%26%261%3D%3Dr)%26%264%3D%3D%3D(t%3Dt.charAt(0).repeat(2)%2Bt.charAt(1).repeat(2)%2Bt.charAt(2).repeat(2)).length%26%26(t%2B%3Dt.charAt(3).repeat(2))%2C%22Pic1%22%3D%3D%3De.id%26%26(t%2B%3Da)%2Cvalidate(e%2Ct%2Cr%2Ca)%7Dinitialize()%3B%3C%5C%2Fscript%3E%3C%2Fbody%3E%3C%2Fhtml%3E%27%3Blet%20o%3D0%2Ci%3D0%2Cl%3Dfunction(e)%7B%22contrastletclose%22%21%3D%3De.target.id%26%26(o%3De.clientX%2Ci%3De.clientY%2Cdocument.addEventListener(%22mousemove%22%2Cs)%2Cdocument.addEventListener(%22mouseup%22%2Cd))%7D%2Cs%3Dfunction(t)%7Blet%20r%3Dt.clientX-o%2Cn%3Dt.clientY-i%3Be.style.top%3D%60%24%7Be.offsetTop%2Bn%7Dpx%60%2Ce.style.left%3D%60%24%7Be.offsetLeft%2Br%7Dpx%60%2Co%3Dt.clientX%2Ci%3Dt.clientY%7D%2Cd%3Dfunction()%7Bdocument.removeEventListener(%22mousemove%22%2Cs)%2Cdocument.removeEventListener(%22mouseup%22%2Cd)%7D%3Bt.addEventListener(%22mousedown%22%2Cl)%2Cdocument.addEventListener(%22keyup%22%2Cfunction(t)%7B27%3D%3D%3Dt.keyCode%26%26e.remove()%7D)%2Cdocument.addEventListener(%22securitypolicyviolation%22%2C()%3D%3E%7Ba.remove()%3Bvar%20t%3Ddocument.createTextNode(%22The%20Content%20Security%20Policy%20on%20this%20page%20does%20not%20allow%20embedded%20iframes.%20The%20Contrast%20Checker%20Bookmarklet%20cannot%20run%20on%20this%20page.%20Press%20Esc%20to%20dismiss%20this%20message.%22)%3Be.style.backgroundColor%3D%22%23fff%22%2Ce.style.padding%3D%2215px%22%2Ce.appendChild(t)%7D)%7D%7D()%2Cconsole.log(%22%5CnSource%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fwebaim.org%2Fresources%2Fcontrastchecker%2Fbookmarklet%5CnBookmarklet%20name%3A%20Contrast%20Checker%20(Self-contained)%5Cn%22)%3B
